programs.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programs.sub_title: It's Coming for the Cabin and That's Just Not Supposed to Happen
programs.desc: (M) A celebration turns terrifying when Sasquatches surround a remote cabin. A man struggles to overcome his fear after an unknown creature approaches his tent in the dead of night.

programs.title: Ghost Loop
programs.desc: (M) A couple calls on the Spirit Hunters to investigate a ghost that's terrorizing their three-year-old son in Auburn, WA. They're worried the activity will escalate into violence.
